content: Clogis online. This thread will carry operator notifications, follow-up questions, and approval prompts.
This is a non-Telegram scheduler smoke test for 04:49 UTC. Confirm that the scheduled wakeup fired and summarize the current highest-priority runtime signal in one short reply.

✅ Scheduled wakeup fired for **04:49 UTC** (this scheduler smoke test thread is active and responding).

Highest-priority runtime signal: **Critical slow LCP on profile-related pages** — **/profile**, **/profile/my-family**, and **/profile/collection** (plus **exceptions are spiking** and **web vitals coverage is thin**).

thoughts.reasoning:
**Checking runtime info**

I need to verify some runtime information. I’m considering using a monitoring method to gather this data. I think calling it in parallel is the way to go, as it will likely optimize performance and provide a comprehensive view. By handling it this way, I should be able to check multiple aspects at once and get a well-rounded understanding of the runtime situation. Let’s see what insights I can uncover!
